title: [Econ衝**] 2017 DSE 經濟科試前討論區

replies.msg:
大家終於考哂主科，無論你表現點都好，sunk cost is sunk，呢一刻擔心黎都無用，你而家有既choice就係主攻邊科electives，諗下用咩方法溫好d明多d。

所以，係時候讀下你既elective

Econ呢就係一科投入產出成正比既科，uncertainty會比起文科低，入面既野好多都唔難，好值得巴絲們投資一下。呢一科幾日都可以升到grade。

之前係我自己個頹fb page都post緊一d簡單但極重要，一定要知既野：
1. Syllabus
2. Electives
3. Cut-off （未出）

之後就係一d specific 少少既問題（答題，概念），要大家提出，多人想知，如果有咩想問你可以post係度，等咁多econ人都可以討論下。

有一樣野想講左先，係最後階段唔好亂做mock，出面好多人求其寫d錯野／out-syl野落去（我見過有mock叫學生畫indifference curve ），

個人認為，呢一刻值得做既卷有：
－2000年以後既ce，所有dse paper
－咳咳咳既mock（如果你有）
－outliers巴打既題目（如果你有）

有咩問題快d問啦，清concept愈早愈好

問書：

1. Indirect tax（間接稅）係咪一定唔郁AD（總需求） ?

2. Price（價格）有咩functions（功能）？

3. Inelastic Demand（低彈性需求）係咪就係畫直d條demand curve（需求
曲線）？

4. 點先叫positive statement（實證性陳述）？

我既答案：
1. 唔係，有d間接稅（例如sales tax啦）會令firms既profit減低，減低佢地投資意慾，I 跌，AD跌。


2. (1) Allocative function 分配功能 (2) Rationing function 配給功能，呢兩個可以係syllabus搵到。

我想講既係(3)，呢個係syllabus搵唔到既，叫Signal Function 訊息功能，呢個係2015 pp第一次出現，內容大意係話 Prices help transmit information about consumer demand relative to producer supply 價格傳遞有關消費者需求與生產者供應的資訊。呢個相信唔太難明，如果唔清楚既再問啦。


3. 唔係，一般同學覺得Inelastic Demand（低彈性需求）就係畫直d條demand curve只係錯覺，真正既分法係畫一條掂住x,y axis既demand curve，上半部分係elastic 高彈性，下半係inelastic 低彈性。

咁點解會有呢個錯覺？係因為你畫一條直d既線，你好少會掂哂x,y axis，通常都只係掂住x axis，同y-axis有d距離，你如果extend條線去掂y-axis，你就知你係畫緊線既下半，所以係inelastic 低彈性，反之亦然。


4. (1) Value judgment is NOT involved 不涉及主觀價值判斷 (2) Refutable by facts, disagreement to them can be settled by appealing to facts 可被事實推翻，能以事實證明真偽。

1) side effect會有機會郁

2)allocated
仲有一個rot字頭英文字母跟住唔記得咗係咩
3）可以咁講 或者一條demand curve mid pt 嘅下面
4）可以用事實或者調查證明係啱

1. Not sure
2. Function of price: allocating (determine what to be produced) and rationing (highest payer get the good)
3. No. for any demand curve, upper region is elastic region, mid-point is Ed=1, lower region is inelastic region
4. Positive statement is a statement that could be proved or disproved by fact


1 should be yes(?) indirect tax on a certain good causes its supply curve shift left, and P increase Q decrease. If demand is elastic, %decrease in Q is greater than % increase in P. Then its expenditure drops. Therefore consumption expenditure drops. Assuming that general price level doesn't change after imposing the indirect tax, AD drops.

咁點解會有呢個錯覺？係因為你畫一條直d既線，你好少會掂哂x,y axis，通常都只係掂住x axis，同y-axis有d距離，你如果extend條線去掂y-axis，你就知你係畫緊線既下半，所以係inelastic 低彈性，反之亦然。


4. (1) Value judgment is NOT involved 不涉及主觀價值判斷 (2) Refutable by facts, disagreement to them can be settled by appealing to facts 可被事實推翻，能以事實證明真偽。

先諗佢係唔係係 effective 嘅 price floor.
$130 係高過 equilirium price 所以係 effective.
之後就當佢係 demand supply diagram 咁畫返幅類似嘅圖。
Qt=2.
當佢 P=$150, Qd=0.
Consumer surplus=(($150-$130)x2)/2
Producer surplus=consumer surplus 下面個梯形.
畫咗幅圖你就會識計。
唔建議搽晒$130以下嗰啲，因為可以幫到畫圖。

可以自己assume p=150 then qt=0?
如果咁計 cs咪=$20?
但個答案係a

1. 唔可以咁assume
2. 佢唔係三角形，唔可以就咁計三角形area
Concept 錯曬wor 同學
Suppose CS = for all max willingness to pay > price; Sum(Maximum willingness to pay - market price)


你啱。
唔可以assume，不過 concept 類似。
Total surplus 係基於 Qt=2.
所以Q=1,2 嘅 surplus 都 capture 哂做 total surplus
Total surplus=($140-$100)+($130-$110)=$60
諗linear case 就ok，唔洗諗圖。(不過圖係有幫助)

利申：N年前考過 DSE Econ

Original equilibrium price原本均衡價格 = $120
Price floor 價格下限 = $130

=> Effective Price floor 有效價格下限

而家交易量= 2 unit

咁TSS = summation(MB-MC)，我地知MB=D, MC=S

TSS = (140-100) + (130-110)= $60

其實呢度涉及AL methodology嗰part。
MV≡PY 只係從兩個角度看同一件事，邏輯上不可能錯亦不可能被推翻，連想像中係錯嘅可能性都冇。
四腳蛇有四隻腳，1+1=2，你點想像都冇可能錯。
但係太陽由東邊升起其實唔係邏輯上諗唔到呢句係錯，例如可以係由西邊升起。呢句係可以喺想像中錯嘅。但係事實上太陽的確係由東邊升起，所以呢句說話其實已經被驗證咗，refutable by facts.

Outliers大法：
「假如你有A、B兩個選項。揀A的機會成本= A的金錢成本 + (B的價值 - B的金錢成本)」
注意一個選項的金錢成本指選擇該選項後必須支付的金錢成本。

好亂 都唔知佢個definition想點 又話highest valued option forgone但又要計埋俾左嘅錢

1st choice: A
2nd choice: B
3rd choice: C
咁嘅情況 你揀A嘅話 OC就會係B嘅value

但如果題目淨係比左一個choice(A)你
問你揀A嘅OC係乜
咁就會係揀A背後所出嘅錢 時間 同其他non-monetary cost

同樣道理
有個人用$30000買左樣野(當係A)個題
1st choice: A
2nd choice: B
但當B對買野個個人黎講嘅value係細過$30000嘅時候 就會變左：
1st choice: A
2nd choice: $30000 cash
3rd choice: B
咁OC就會係$30000
而當個$30000+value of B=value of A嘅時候
咁你揀A 已經係放棄左both B and $30000 cash
所以 當題目冇講到明value of B係幾多嘅時候 你唔知B定$30000 cash係個個人嘅2nd choice(highest-valued option forgone) 所以OC就會包埋個$30000

有個人own a house個題
paid a sum to buy a house已係sunk cost
唔計入OC
真正嘅OC係rental income forgone(自往緊冇得租比人收租)

想問下依題 雖然之前講過 但係好似冇下文
一齊討論下
40. Which of the following situations may lessen fiscal deficit and a trade at the same time?
(1) a reduction in nominal interest rate
(2) a depreciation of the economy’s currency
(3) an increase in income tax
A. (1) and (2) only
B. (1) and (3) only
C. (2) and (3) only
D. (1), (2) and (3)

答案係C
(1)唔啱係因為fiscal嗰部分啱 但trade就錯
nominal interest rate decrease會lower the cost of earlier consumption
之後C increase >Y increase>tax revenue increase>fiscal deficit will lessen
而trade嗰邊
因為C增加後Y增加 令import多左
(X-M)會再細左 trade deficit will be more worse
我想知我有冇理解錯

<1(inelastic) 就反之亦然

1st choice: A
2nd choice: B

1st choice: A
2nd choice: $30000 cash

咁OC就會係$30000
而當個$30000+value of B=value of A嘅時候
咁你揀A 已經係放棄左both B and $30000 cash
所以 當題目冇講到明value of B係幾多嘅時候 你唔知B定$30000 cash係個個人嘅2nd choice(highest-valued option forgone) 所以OC就會包埋個$30000

你要明deposit creation concept
假設銀行本身唔可以loan, banking system而家有:
Reserve: 100
Loan: 0
Deposit: 100

跟住而家有個fractional reserve scheme, (R/D)>/=20%，姐係rrr=20%，咁有銀行loan out, in banking system:
Reserve: 20
Loan: 80
Deposit: 100

Then money redeposited into banking system,
Reserve: 100
Loan: 80
Deposit: 180

And then banks lend out again:
Reserve: 100-64
Loan: 80+64
Deposit: 180

Then redeposit
Reserve: 100
Loan: 144
Deposit: 244

咁你個deposit既數係:
100+100(1-rrr)+100(1-rrr)^2... -(a)
呢個就係math core 既GS sum to infinity
So, (a)=100/(1-(1-rrr)=100*(1/rrr)

△%M +△% V ≈ △%P + △% Y
因為classical( 古典 ) ,即係長期咁，VY不變
條公式就會係
△%M ≈ △%P
另外， △%P亦為通脹率(inflation rate)

睇清楚題目先
題目話m is growing at a constant percentage
呢個percentage唔係%△M
佢嘅意思係，M in this year=Initial M * (1+r)^t
t is no. of years passed
r 就係佢所講嘅percentage
咁%△M係咩？
畫一幅graph，y axis 係M，x axis係t，呢幅graph嘅slope就係%△M。
比幅graph你睇

見唔見到幅graph係越嚟越斜，即係slope一直上升，即係%△M一直上升，根據mv=py，%△P上升，即係inflation rate 上升
至於要解釋點解%△p係上升 constantly, 就牽涉到難少少嘅數學(微積分)，呢條題目其實對數底差嘅同學唔着數。
